New Project Support under TUBITAK Career Development Program

Faculty of Economics, Administrative and Social Sciences, Department of Psychology Prof. Dr. Aslı Erciyes’ project proposal titled “The effect of second language acquisition on the fictional, linguistic and perceptual processes of narrative skills in preschool and school-age children: A longitudinal study” has been entitled to be supported within the scope of TÜBİTAK ARDEB 3501 Career Development Program. We wish our professor success in her research process.
